tests.description: Fork body with top-level if-chain dispatching on the iteration item — each branch executes a different code path. Exercises the shape the parallel/seq desugar produces. Two of three arms interrupt; on resume, the non-interrupting arm's result must be cached and only the interrupted arms re-execute. Final output exact-matches a comma-joined string built from each arm's distinct return-shape ({a:...}, {b:...}, {c:...}), confirming per-arm bindings round-trip correctly through the fork result aggregation.
